etymology.description: semantic 木(木) (mù, "wood") + phonetic 冘(冘) (yóu) -> pillow
etymology.interpretation: 枕 (zhěn, "pillow") combines 木(木) (mù, "wood") with 冘(冘) (yóu) for its sound. The wooden or firm block traditionally used as a headrest or pillow relies on the semantic 木(木), which denotes material properties and the phonic sign 冘(冘) to provide the correct pronunciation.

examples.chinese: 我每天晚上都用一个软枕(我每天晚上都用一個軟枕)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ měitiān wǎnshàng dōu yòng yī gè ruǎn zhěn.
examples.english: I use a soft pillow every night.

examples.chinese: 他喜欢用高枕(他喜歡用高枕)，因为它能支撑脖子(因為它能支撐脖子)。
examples.pinyin: Tā xǐhuān yòng gāo zhěn, yīnwèi tā néng zhīchēng bózi.
examples.english: He likes to use a high pillow because it supports his neck.

examples.chinese: 枕头(枕頭)是床上必备的物品(是床上必備的物品)。
examples.pinyin: Zhěntou shì chuángshàng bìbèi de wùpǐn.
examples.english: A pillow is an essential item on the bed.
